CustomField.label: How Rows Appear
CustomField.description: Cosmetic only. Controls how the check rows animate in while running. It does not change when checks run (that is the Run Checks When field).

value.label: Reveal rows one at a time

CustomField.inlineHelpText: Show all rows at once = every row is listed immediately and fills in. Reveal one at a time = each row appears as its check finishes.
